subject: fix(debug): normalize 12 invalid 'debug' severity calls to 'info'
body:
Valid severities are info/success/warn/error. Twelve calls across 4 files
used 'debug' as severity — not in the valid set. These are all low-noise
UI/state events that belong at 'info' level. Dropped explicit severity arg
where it was the default, removed dead 'debug' key from SEVERITY_COLORS.

Files: App.jsx (5), useAdState.js (4), ExportButtons.jsx (1), ReaderMode.jsx (2)

Tags: debug, cleanup
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: debug-system
Semver: patch
